title: Craft Hub Marble Bear Creative Marble Pouring Kit Design/Paint Your Own Bear Childrens Kids Art & Craft (Pastel Edition)
features: PASTEL BEAR POURING KIT : Create your own marble-effect pastel bear with calming pastel paints and everything included for a fun, mess-friendly pour paint project
ALL-IN-ONE CRAFT SET : Comes with 23cm bear figure, 3 x 60ml pastel pouring paints, paintbrush, plastic spoon, 2 paper cups, paper plate, double-sided tape and clear instructions
CREATE AMAZING EFFECTS : Pour, drip and swirl pastel colours over the bear to produce a striking marbled design – no artistic skills needed, just enjoy the process
POSEABLE BEAR FIGURE TO DISPLAY : The bear’s head, arms and legs can be moved into different positions, allowing you to customise your design and proudly display once dry
ARTS & CRAFTS GIFT FOR CHILDREN : Perfect for kids aged 5+ who love creative activities. A great idea for birthdays, rainy days, playdates or as a fun screen-free project
UNIQUE EVERY TIME : No two bears are the same – each kit produces a one-of-a-kind creation your child can treasure, gift, or use as a keepsake decoration
description: The Pastel Edition Bear Pouring Art Kit is a creative twist on the marble pour painting trend, designed to inspire children aged 5 and up. This all-in-one set makes a brilliant gift or activity for kids who enjoy arts and crafts. With calming pastel paints and a poseable bear figure, it’s both fun to make and rewarding to display. Everything included in the kit: 23cm bear figure 3 x 60ml pastel paints Paintbrush Spoon 2 paper cups Paper plate Double-sided tape Step-by-step instructions Children will love layering the pastel paints into a cup and pouring them over the bear to create swirling marble patterns. The paint flows evenly, with the plate catching excess drips, making the activity simple and contained. Once dry, the bear’s movable head, arms and legs allow for custom posing, ready to be proudly shown off on a shelf, in a bedroom, or gifted as a personalised handmade present. This craft kit is designed to be straightforward, mess-contained (simply add newspaper and an apron), and suitable for solo play or family craft sessions. It encourages creativity, focus, and hands-on learning while producing a pastel masterpiece that’s completely unique every time. Features: Kit includes 23cm bear, 3 pastel paints and tools Suitable for children aged 5+ Poseable bear figure with movable head, arms and legs Simple, mess-contained pour painting activity Creates a one-of-a-kind pastel marble design
